name: mcp-server-context-7
description: Context7 MCP - Up-to-date Docs For Any Cursor Prompt.

rating.reason: Excellent documentation quality across both tools. Names are specific and purposeful. Descriptions are comprehensive (4-6 sentences) covering functionality, usage context, workflow requirements, and important limitations. Parameters include detailed descriptions with clear examples and security warnings. The documentation proactively addresses the relationship between tools, usage limits, and edge cases, providing complete guidance for effective usage.
